results.rendered_html:
ila a. [il-ka] Sleepy.
— lā
1 The earth.
2 A cow.
3 Speech; &c, see iḍā.
Comp.
— golaḥ, -laṃ the earth, the globe.
— talaṃ
1 the fourth place in the circle of the zodiac.
2 the surface of the earth.
— dharaḥ a mountain;  Śi. 20. 54. 
— vṛtaṃ one of the nine Varṣas or divisions of the known world; paścānmālyavataḥ prācyāṃ gaṃdhamādanaśailataḥ . ilāvṛtaṃ nīlagireryāmyato niṣadhādudak ...
